advisor_talking_points: Use the intake review to confirm that the source maps cleanly into the canonical snapshot before over-interpreting analytics.
For the Plaid-shaped mock path, focus on account, security, holding, and cash mapping rather than live Plaid behavior.
The downstream analytics working from the canonical snapshot is the main product proof in this workflow.
Any missing identifiers, stale values, or manual classification gaps should become follow-up tasks.
caveats: This intake review uses synthetic local data only.
Plaid-shaped mock input is not live Plaid, Plaid Sandbox, Plaid Link, or real account data.
The workflow does not prove production reconciliation or data completeness.
emphasized_report_sections: What This Demo Does Not Yet Prove
workflow_template.intended_audience: Advisor or operations reviewer checking whether a new source can feed the Arangur workflow.
workflow_template.meeting_goal: Check source shape, canonical mapping, basic valuation readiness, and obvious follow-up items before deeper analysis.
workflow_template.next_upgrade_path: Add adapter-specific validation summaries and source coverage checks before live ingestion design.
primary_questions: Did the source adapter produce a valid canonical snapshot?
Are accounts, managers, holdings, cash, and securities mapped clearly enough for review?
What needs human cleanup before the portfolio can become a stronger workflow example?
suggested_follow_up_actions: Review source provenance and mapping fields before expanding the adapter.
Record any account, security, or manager labels that should be normalized.
Decide which source-specific validations should be added next.
